title: Peranggu Pahlawan
description: Senjata + Busana Melayu - Modded Edition! Compatible with Fabric and Quilt, as well as (Neo)Forge via Sinytra Connector
body:
# Peranggu Pahlawan | ڤرڠݢو ڤهلاون **Supported Versions / Versi Disokong**
- Fabric (**1.20.1**, **1.21.1**, **1.21.4**, **1.21.5**, 1.21.6-**1.21.8**, 1.21.9-**1.21.10**, **1.21.11**, **26.1**) - Requires *latest* Fabric API ([1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.20.1) | [1.21.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.1) | [1.21.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.4) | [1.21.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.5) | [1.21.6-1.21.8](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.6&g=1.21.7&g=1.21.8) | [1.21.9-1.21.10](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.9&g=1.21.10) | [1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.11) | [26.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=26.1&g=26.1.1&g=26.1.2)) - Quilt (**1.20.1**, **1.21.1**, **1.21.4**, **1.21.5**, 1.21.6-**1.21.8**, 1.21.9-**1.21.10**, **1.21.11**, **26.1**) - Requires *latest* Fabric API ([1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.20.1) | [1.21.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.1) | [1.21.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.4) | [1.21.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.5) | [1.21.6-1.21.8](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.6&g=1.21.7&g=1.21.8) | [1.21.9-1.21.10](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.9&g=1.21.10) | [1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.11) | [26.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=26.1&g=26.1.1&g=26.1.2))
or *latest* Quilted Fabric API ([1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl/versions?g=1.20.1)) - Forge (**1.20.1**) - Requires *latest* Sinytra Connector ([1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector/versions?g=1.20.1)) and *latest* Forgified Fabric API ([1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api/versions?g=1.20.1)) - NeoForge (**1.21.1**) - Requires *latest* Sinytra Connector ([1.21.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector/versions?g=1.21.1)) and *latest* Forgified Fabric API ([1.21.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.1)) **Why was this mod created? / Kenapa mod ini dicipta?**
- This mod is created more as my (NuruddinPlays') first attempt at following a modding tutorial, as I have been wanting to learn Minecraft modding for quite some time now... And I have also been wanting a modded version of the Senjata Melayu and Busana Melayu resource pack for quite a while now... - Mod ini dicipta lebih ke arah sebagai percubaan pertama saya (NuruddinPlays) dalam mengikut tutorial modding, memandangkan saya ni dah lama teringin untuk belajar Minecraft modding... Dan kebetulan juga saya dah lama teringin untuk buat versi modded untuk pek sumber Senjata Melayu dan Busana Melayu... **What are the features of this mod? / Apakah ciri-ciri dalam mod ini?**
- ![Golden Keris item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9528cc003d2d061a3871fa3cb226efe9ddebd86a.png) Keris - A weapon like the sword, but with much faster attack speed, higher attack damage, and generally lower durability - Sebuah senjata seperti pedang, tapi dengan kelajuan serangan yang lebih pantas, kecederaan serangan lebih tinggi dan ketahanan yang agak kurang - ![Golden Parang item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20c1a24eaaeba19da89d6804fad4419a116fd94f.png) Parang - A tool and weapon like the axe, but with a much higher attack damage and durability, much slower attack speed **and a special ability** (new since v1.1.0) - All parang variants can mine any log types (wood, log, stem, hyphae and all it's stripped variants) in a **3x3** area - The mining speed is slowed down significantly to balance the ability's benefits - Sebuah alatan dan senjata seperti kapak, tapi dengan kecederaan serangan dan ketahanan yang sangat tinggi dengan kelajuan serangan yang sangat perlahan, dan juga **keupayaan yang istimewa** (baharu sejak v1.1.0) - Semua jenis parang boleh melombong semua jenis batang kayu (biasa/balak, batang/hifa kirmizi dan gila, dan juga semua jenis batang kayu yang dikupas kulit) dalam kawasan **3x3** - Kelajuan perlombongan telah diperlahankan secara ketara untuk mengimbangi faedah keupayaan ini - ![Songkok item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/046c3a136ee0efa421004dad776961fceeb3cc9c.png) ![Golden Tengkolok item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7eb38b96e3b1aa8818dbd562ac69ddabb33b9c4.png) ![Golden Baju Melayu item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4379d59e5ba589f7eb87eec5bc991b840c6a2089.png) ![Golden Seluar Melayu item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8526d1ea0f9037277207564fced37338be847303.png) ![Golden samping item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e118fe9f0be58107ff2c7c84763000a3b932ed63.png) Male Attire Set / Set Busana Lelaki (Songkok/Tengkolok, Baju Melayu, Seluar Melayu, Samping) - All the attributes are the same as the vanilla armor set, except the Songkok and Tengkolok, which have slightly lower durability levels, and Samping, which have slightly higher durability levels - Semua sifatnya sama seperti set zirah vanila, kecuali Songkok dan Tengkolok yang mempunyai tahap ketahanan yang sedikit lebih rendah, dan Samping yang mempunyai tahap ketahanan yang sedikit lebih tinggi - ![Golden Gandik item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1fdaf3ac272c56987acfff1909cbe315bb43dcd.png) ![Golden Baju Kurung item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a8b8286924670c68cdfc8ab885a445eb036a10.png) ![Golden Kain Sarung item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b85e6b32da59ce8927a8c88138e0ccf000120b21.png) ![Golden Kasut item icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2e075ba8536c7b1c5ce5c8fcf09434920b27142.png) Female Attire Set / Set Busana Perempuan (Gandik, Baju Kurung, Kain Sarung, Kasut) - All the attributes are the same as the vanilla armor set, except the Gandik and Kasut, which have slightly lower durability levels - Semua sifatnya sama seperti set zirah vanila, kecuali Gandik dan Kasut yang mempunyai tahap ketahanan yang sedikit lebih rendah **Support for Other Mods / Sokongan Mod Lain**
- [BetterCombat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) - Made all the keris and parang use the sword's and axe's weapon attribute preset respectively - Menambahkan praset atribut senjata pedang kepada keris dan kapak kepada parang - [Sword Blocking Mechanics](https://modrinth.com/mod/sword-blocking-mechanics/) - Made all the keris and parang be able to block attacks like the sword do in pre-1.9 versions - Membolehkan keris dan parang menghalang serangan seperti pedang dalam versi sebelum 1.9 - [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) - Made all the keris and parang use the sword's and axe's default capabilities respectively - Menambahkan kebolehan lalai pedang kepada keris dan kapak kepada parang - [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) - Supports Legacy Console Edition's crafting and creative interfaces - Menyokong antara muka pertukangan dan kreatif seperti dalam Legacy Console Edition - [Combatify](https://modrinth.com/mod/combatify) - All of Peranggu Pahlawan's weapons will have correct cooldown time when using this mod - Semua senjata dalam Peranggu Pahlawan akan mempunyai masa cooldown yang betul apabila menggunakan mod ini --- <-- **Bedrock Version**
Check out other MCEM packs! / Jom tengok pek MCEM lainnya!
--- **Can I use this mod in my modpack? / Bolehkah saya gunakan mod ini dalam modpack saya?**
- Of course! As long as the modpack is hosted on Modrinth, you're good to go! Just be sure to dm me on MCEM's Twitter (dm is open) to let me know - Sudah tentu! Selagi modpack itu diterbitkan di Modrinth, dipersilakan! Tapi pastikan korang dm saya di Twitter MCEM (dm terbuka btw) untuk beritahu saya --- **Credits / Penghargaan**
| Credits / Penghargaan | Contributor / Penyumbang | | :--- | :--- | | Programmer, Parang Designer
Pengatur Cara, Pereka Bentuk Parang | Muhammad Nuruddin (NuruddinPlays) | | Attire & Keris Designer
Pereka Bentuk Busana & Keris | flurrry | | Idea for Keris
Idea Keris | Muhammad Rayyan (LitBoiss) | | Idea for Machete
Idea Parang| Muhammad Izhar Khan (IzhyCP) | | Idea for Female Attire Variant
Idea Variasi Busana Wanita | SaraNyan | | Design Assistance
Bantuan Reka Bentuk | Ahmad Ali Karim (EmpAhmadK) | | Idea for Mod
Idea Mod | Kisamer **Additional Credits / Penghargaan Tambahan**
- [Kaupenjoe](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCbzPhyLcO8VP25dZ7kaUyAw) - For his great modding tutorial which helped a ton during the early stages of this mod's development - Untuk tutorial modding yang sangat membantu saat fasa awal pembangunan mod ini - [1.20 Fabric Tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKGarocXCE1EO43Dlf5JGh7Yk-kRAXUEJ) | [1.21 Fabric Tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKGarocXCE1H_HxOYihQMq0mlpqiUJj4L) --- **Sebuah Projek Koleksi Pek Sumber Minecraft Bertemakan Melayu
A Malay-themed Minecraft Resource Pack Collection Project
سبواه ڤروجيک کوليکسي ڤيک سومبر ماءينکرف‌ت برتيماکن ملايو**
